description: No dedicated writing domain — 24 Writing & Documentation cases fall to general or get misrouted
root_cause: domain-router.ts has communications keywords (email, write, draft) but they route to a non-existent communications domain, not a writing engine
fix: Add writing/communications domain entries in deliberation.ts DOMAIN_CONTEXT and ensure domain-router maps writing keywords to it

description: Board classifies text-generation subtasks as implement stage instead of report, causing unnecessary approval gates
root_cause: Deliberation prompt does not clearly distinguish implement (code changes) from report (text generation) stages
fix: Add explicit guidance in deliberation system prompt: implement stage is ONLY for code changes, use report for text generation

description: No dedicated research domain — 24 Research & Analysis cases fall to general
root_cause: domain-router.ts has research keywords but they map to a research domain that has no entry in deliberation.ts DOMAIN_CONTEXT
fix: Add research domain entries in deliberation.ts with research-specific governed loop and context

description: Perplexity outputs lack citation URLs — research pass criteria requires specific source links
root_cause: Worker Perplexity prompt asks for URLs but does not enforce output format with mandatory source links
fix: Strengthen Perplexity system prompt to require Source: [URL] format for every claim

description: No learning/tutoring domain — 24 Learning & Tutoring cases fall to general
root_cause: No learning domain in intake.ts or deliberation.ts DOMAIN_CONTEXT
fix: Add learning domain with tutoring-specific context and prompts
